mapper.select: SELECT PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, LAT AS lat, LNG AS lng, NEARBY_RADIUS AS nearbyRadius FROM INV.CONCIERGE_PROPERTY_EXT WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_PROPERTY_EXT (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, LAT, LNG, NEARBY_RADIUS, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{nearbyRadius}, #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE INV.CONCIERGE_PROPERTY_EXT SET LAT = #{lat}, LNG = #{lng}, NEARBY_RADIUS = #{nearbyRadius}, MOD_USER = #{modUser}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd}
mapper.select: SELECT PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, FEATURE_CD AS featureCd, USE_YN AS useYn, SORT_ORD AS sortOrd, CONFIG_JSON AS configJson FROM INV.CONCIERGE_FEATURE WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} ORDER BY SORT_ORD

SELECT PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, FEATURE_CD AS featureCd, SORT_ORD AS sortOrd, CONFIG_JSON AS configJson FROM INV.CONCIERGE_FEATURE WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_FEATURE (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, FEATURE_CD, USE_YN, SORT_ORD, CONFIG_JSON, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{featureCd}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd}, #{configJson}, #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE INV.CONCIERGE_FEATURE SET USE_YN = #{useYn}, SORT_ORD = #{sortOrd}, CONFIG_JSON = #{configJson}, MOD_USER = #{modUser}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND FEATURE_CD = #{featureCd}
mapper.select: SELECT PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, ITEM_CD AS itemCd, ITEM_NM AS itemNm, ITEM_NM_ENG AS itemNmEng, MAX_QTY AS maxQty, USE_YN AS useYn, SORT_ORD AS sortOrd FROM INV.CONCIERGE_AMENITY_ITEM WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_AMENITY_ITEM (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, ITEM_NM_ENG, MAX_QTY, USE_YN, SORT_ORD, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{itemNmEng}, #{maxQty}, #{useYn}, #{sortOrd}, #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT REQ_NO AS reqNo, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, RESV_NO AS resvNo, RM_NO AS rmNo, ITEM_CD AS itemCd, QTY AS qty, MEMO AS memo, PROC_STAT_CD AS procStatCd, REG_DT AS regDt FROM INV.CONCIERGE_AMENITY_REQ WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND RESV_NO = #{resvNo} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_AMENITY_REQ (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, RESV_NO, RM_NO, ITEM_CD, QTY, MEMO, PROC_STAT_CD, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{resvNo}, #{rmNo}, #{itemCd}, #{qty}, #{memo}, 'REQ', #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT REQ_NO AS reqNo, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, RESV_NO AS resvNo, RM_NO AS rmNo, CAR_NO AS carNo, CAR_TP AS carTp, MEMO AS memo, PMS_SYNC_YN AS pmsSyncYn, REG_DT AS regDt FROM INV.CONCIERGE_PARKING WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND RESV_NO = #{resvNo} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_PARKING (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, RESV_NO, RM_NO, CAR_NO, CAR_TP, MEMO, PMS_SYNC_YN, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{resvNo}, #{rmNo}, #{carNo}, #{carTp}, #{memo}, 'N', #{regUser}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT REQ_NO AS reqNo, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, RESV_NO AS resvNo, RM_NO AS rmNo, REQ_OUT_TM AS reqOutTm, ADD_AMT AS addAmt, CUR_CD AS curCd, RATE_TP_CD AS rateTpCd, PROC_STAT_CD AS procStatCd, REG_DT AS regDt FROM INV.CONCIERGE_LATE_CO WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND RESV_NO = #{resvNo} ORDER BY REG_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CONCIERGE_LATE_CO (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, RESV_NO, RM_NO, REQ_OUT_TM, ADD_AMT, CUR_CD, RATE_TP_CD, PROC_STAT_CD, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{resvNo}, #{rmNo}, #{reqOutTm}, #{addAmt}, #{curCd}, #{rateTpCd}, 'REQ', #{regUser}, NOW())
INSERT INTO INV.CCS_DEPARTMENT (PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, DEPT_CD, DEPT_NM, SORT_ORD, USE_YN, REG_USER, REG_DT) VALUES (#{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{deptCd}, #{deptNm}, #{sortOrd}, 'Y', 'ADMIN', NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM INV.CCS_DEPARTMENT WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
mapper.select: SELECT TASK_ID AS taskId, SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM INV.CCS_TASK WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND RM_NO = #{rmNo} AND SOURCE_TYPE LIKE 'HK_%' ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INV.CCS_TASK WHERE ASSIGNEE_ID = #{assigneeId} AND STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}

SELECT TASK_ID AS taskId, PROP_CD AS propCd, CMPX_CD AS cmpxCd, DEPT_CD AS deptCd, SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, SOURCE_REF_NO AS sourceRefNo, TITLE AS title, MEMO AS memo, RM_NO AS rmNo, ASSIGNEE_ID AS assigneeId, STATUS_CD AS statusCd, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM INV.CCS_TASK WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV.CCS_TASK (TASK_ID, PROP_CD, CMPX_CD, DEPT_CD, SOURCE_TYPE, SOURCE_REF_NO, TITLE, MEMO, RM_NO, ASSIGNEE_ID, STATUS_CD, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{propCd}, #{cmpxCd}, #{deptCd}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceRefNo}, #{title}, #{memo}, #{rmNo}, #{assigneeId}, #{statusCd}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE INV.CCS_TASK SET STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}
UPDATE INV.CCS_TASK SET ASSIGNEE_ID = #{assigneeId}, STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT ASSIGNEE_ID AS assigneeId, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM INV.CCS_TASK WHERE PROP_CD = #{propCd} AND CMPX_CD = #{cmpxCd} AND DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND STATUS_CD IN ('REQ','ASSIGNED','IN_PROG') GROUP BY ASSIGNEE_ID
